@@ -2,28 +2,26 @@
 
 ## Strategic Overview
-SURVIVAL MODE. PMI crashed to 46.1. Competitor quality floors raised significantly (~0.40 since Day 74). conversion at 0%.
+SURVIVAL MODE (EXTENDED). PMI at 46.1 (Contraction). Cash critical. 14 weeks runway at $3.2k/week burn. No new subs due to high competitor quality floor and recession.
 
-## Strategy (Week 13)
+## Strategy (Week 15)
 - PMI: 46.1 (Contraction).
-- Runway: ~8-10 weeks after deep cuts.
-- Quality: Plan B/C at 0.57, Plan A upgraded to Tier 3 (0.9x).
+- Runway: ~14 weeks at $3.2k/week net burn.
+- Spend: Deep cuts to global dev ($100) and ops ($50).
+- S3 Focus: Targeted $50/day Dev and $25/day Ops for S3 to maintain quality edge and satisfaction.
 - Ad Spend: KILLED all ad spend ($0).
-- Support: Targeted $50/day Ops spend on S3.
-- Development: Cut global to $200, kept $100 targeted on S3.
-- Prices: A=$15, B=$79, C=$129. (Significant cuts to meet defensive market).
-- Capacity: Downscaled to Tier 0 ($85/day).
-- Social: Announced price cuts and focus on core value.
+- Prices: A=$15, B=$79, C=$129.
+- Capacity: Tier 0 ($85/day).
+- Social: Engaged with users regarding support and stability.
 
 ## Key Metrics Tracking
 - Day 7: $972k cash, 0 subs.
 - Day 70: $92.3k cash, 51 subs.
-- Day 77: $81.1k cash, 52 subs.
 - Day 84: $64.9k cash, 53 subs.
-- Day 91: $47.8k cash, 53 subs. (Conversion 0%, burn unsustainable at $18k/week, cut to $5k/week).
+- Day 91: $47.8k cash, 53 subs.
+- Day 105: $38.6k cash, 52 subs. (Conversion 0%, burn reduced to survival level).
 
 ## Insights
-- Massive competitor quality floor inflation (~0.40) has priced me out of the market.
-- PMI at 46.1 is killing conversion.
-- Survival is the priority. Cut burn to minimum and hope for market recovery or slow quality build.
-- Price sensitivity is high; testing $15/79/129 price points.
-- 11-12 weeks runway at current burn.
+- Competitor events have raised quality floors significantly (~0.58 for S3).
+- Conversion is zero due to combination of PMI contraction and barely-meeting-the-floor quality.
+- S3 is the most loyal and highest potential group; focusing remaining resources there.
+- 14 weeks runway provides time for economic recovery or quality buildup.
